domain_hint: centrifugal pump CFD analysis (6-stage, 3550 RPM, RANS/MRF, ANSYS Fluent) – design gate credibility assessment
ambiguity_notes: Four factors carry contradictory evidence: (1) near-wall y+ compliance — Slide 3 documents y+ as low as 12 (non-compliant) while Slide 4 and the executive summary on Slide 12 claim full compliance; (2) validation accuracy — Slide 6 table shows 2.4% deviation at 40% BEP while Slide 12 executive summary claims within 1% across all points; (3) validation applicability — Slide 8 cites prior use of AQ-VAL-019 as supporting confidence while Slide 4 notes that report covers a different impeller diameter (320 mm vs. 415 mm) making its applicability undemonstrated; (4) fitness-for-purpose scope — Slide 11 restricts binding use to BEP±20% while Slide 12 recommends the model for "all design decisions through Phase 4" without restriction.
